overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a distinctive red coat walking through a modern urban environment. The character progresses from a sidewalk alongside a busy street, past a tall monument, and into a contemporary plaza featuring a reflective water pool and modern architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with classical stone architecture

events.description: character passes a bench with a seated NPC on the right side

agents.ego_description: character in red coat walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a busy street, approaching a tall monument structure ahead

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench against the stone building, facing the street

entered.detail: classical stone building with large windows and benches along the facade
black metal railing separating sidewalk from the multi-lane street
tall cylindrical silver obelisk monument visible in the distance ahead
trees with pink blossoms lining the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane city street, with a classical stone office building on the right and traffic passing on the left. A tall silver monument is visible ahead in the distance, and a single NPC sits on a bench against the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza transition with monument and water feature

events.description: character passes the tall silver monument and enters the plaza area
reflective water pool becomes visible as character approaches the modern plaza

agents.ego_description: character walks past the monument and turns slightly left toward the plaza, approaching a water feature

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on stone steps near the water feature, conversing

entered.detail: large rectangular reflective pool with dark water surface
contemporary building with glass facade and geometric entrance structure
tall thin evergreen trees lining the approach to the building

segments.scene_description: The character passes the tall silver monument on the left and transitions into a paved plaza area. A reflective water pool comes into view ahead, flanked by tall cypress trees, with a modern glass building featuring a distinctive rectangular entrance frame visible in the distance. Two NPCs sit on stone steps to the left near the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern plaza with reflective pool and contemporary architecture

events.description: character walks alongside the reflective water pool, approaching the building entrance

agents.ego_description: character continues walking across the plaza toward the modern building's rectangular entrance frame

entered.detail: large modern rectangular stone frame marking the building entrance
modern metallic trash receptacle on the plaza pavement
sculptural figure visible in the plaza beyond the water feature

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the open paved plaza alongside the reflective water pool, approaching the distinctive rectangular entrance frame of the modern glass building. The tall silver monument is now behind, and the scene opens up to show additional plaza features including a distant statue and modern landscaping.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a busy urban sidewalk into a spacious, modern architectural plaza. It begins with the character walking along a concrete path beside a multi-lane street and a classical stone office building, moving steadily toward a distant silver monument. As the character passes the monument, the environment shifts from the narrow city street into an open paved plaza where a reflective water pool and tall cypress trees emerge. The scene then expands as the camera follows the character alongside the water, leaving the monument behind and moving toward a modern glass building with a distinctive rectangular entrance frame. Finally, the view opens up to reveal the full scale of the plaza, including distant statues and contemporary landscaping under a clear urban sky.
